description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches node_modules, runs npm install before each job, and defines the stages test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add a cypress-e2e job using the cypress/base image that executes npm run ci-test and saves cypress/screenshots and cypress/videos as artifacts that expire after one week. Also in test add a lint job using the node image that runs npm run lint. In the build stage add a cypress-e2e-static job with the cypress/base image that runs npm run ci-test-static and stores the same artifacts for one week. In the deploy stage add a deploy_review job that creates a review environment named review/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME with URL https://$CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG.gke.revolunet.com, runs only on branch pipelines except master, and echoes "Deploy a review app". Also add a pages job using the node image that runs npm run build, publishes the out directory as a manual artifact, and targets the production environment.
